title: Budget
Watch Party
parties.subtitle: Watch the Federal Budget announcement live with the inspire9 community — gather in the Kitchen or join from anywhere via eVenue. Chat with everyone in real time, whether you're in the room or online.

venue.label: eVenue — Budget 2026 Watch Party
venue.mobileSub: Tap to join the live eVenue — free
venue.note: Free for all online attendees · No account required

attendance.title: inspire9 Kitchen
paragraphs: Watch live at the inspire9 Kitchen, Level 1, 41–43 Stewart Street, Richmond. Gather with fellow members and react together in person.
Exclusive to inspire9 members. Check your inbox or Slack for details.

attendance.title: Online via eVenue
paragraphs: Join from anywhere — completely free. eVenue by Electron Workshop connects online and in-person attendees in one live chat while watching together.
No account, no cost. Just click the link and you're in.

about.title: About eVenue
paragraphs: eVenue is a live event platform that bridges in-room and online audiences. Everyone watches the same stream while chatting together — no divide between who's there and who's remote.
This eVenue is sponsored by Electron Workshop, Melbourne's community-driven digital infrastructure provider.

features.text: Shared live stream — everyone watches the same Budget broadcast
Unified live chat — in-person and online in one conversation
No login needed — pick a name and you're live instantly
Free for all — open to anyone online, anywhere in Australia
